graph_domain: D(A0) = {x in l2 : sum lambda_n^2 |x_n|^2 < infinity}
limitations: The graph-norm domain is proven for the diagonal reference operator.
Compatibility of all perturbations with this graph domain remains a Kato-Rellich precondition.
open_obligations: prove Hopf, boundary, sector-coupling, heat-lift, and complement-projector compatibility with the A0 graph domain
title: BHSM v1.9 Graph-Norm Domain Report
